headline: Pentair Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.27
summary: Pentair plc announced today that it will pay a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share on August 7, 2026 to shareholders of record at the close of business on July 24, 2026. This is the...
